name: Bakoy Highwaymen Style Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Put half a kilogram of chopped beef into cold water and bring to a boil.
2. Skim the scum off the top.
3. After 20-25 minutes, add 50-60 ounces of chopped chicken.
4. Season with salt and pepper, then an onion.
5. When half cooked, add carrots, parsnips cut into slivers, celery heart, one or two green peppers, tomatoes, and mushrooms (15 oz).
6. Make a broth from these ingredients.
7. Make ribbon noodles from the egg and flour (12 oz).
8. Add the noodles to the soup to cook.
9. Serve with sour cream or sour milk.
